<!-- PR title must follow: type[scope] :: description (e.g. fix[macos] :: sharpen menu bar icon). Avoid the word "add" in the title. -->

## Summary
- Bullet point descriptions of changes

## Impact
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Related Items
- Resolves issues: #[issue-number]
- Closes PRs: #[pr-number]
- Resources: [PRs tab](../../pulls), [Issues tab](../../issues)

## Notes for reviewers
- Additional details or context

## Review
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Code reviewed by reviewer
